title: Word Processors and Typists
description: Use word processor, computer, or typewriter to type letters, reports, forms, or other material from rough draft, corrected copy, or voice recording. May perform other clerical duties as assigned.

tasks.text: Perform other clerical duties, such as answering telephone, sorting and distributing mail, running errands or sending faxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check completed work for spelling, grammar, punctuation, and format.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: File and store completed documents on computer hard drive or disk, or maintain a computer filing system to store, retrieve, update, and delete documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Print and make copies of work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transmit work electronically to other locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Address envelopes or prepare envelope labels, using typewriter or computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Type correspondence, reports, text and other written material from rough drafts, corrected copies, voice recordings, dictation, or previous versions, using a computer, word processor, or typewriter.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Gather, register, and arrange the material to be typed, following instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute and verify totals on report forms, requisitions, or bills, using adding machine or calculator.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Electronically sort and compile text and numerical data, retrieving, updating, and merging documents as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Search for specific sets of stored, typed characters to make changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collate pages of reports and other documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reformat documents, moving paragraphs or columns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust settings for format, page layout, line spacing, and other style requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use data entry devices, such as optical scanners, to input data into computers for revision or editing.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate and resupply printers and computers, changing print wheels or fluid cartridges, adding paper, and loading blank tapes, cards, or disks into equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage schedules and set dates, times, and locations for meetings and appointments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Work with technical material, preparing statistical reports, planning and typing statistical tables, and combining and rearranging material from different sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
